title: dictyogramme obtusa
intro: Dictyogramme obtusa is a species of flowering plant in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the forked thyme fern or forked thyme vine. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dictyogramme obtusa include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in traditional folk medicine practices in various parts of the world.
